service.name: DemoWeather
service.description: Get current weather and forecasts for cities worldwide.

capabilities.description: Get current weather for a city

params.city: string, required — city name (e.g. Seoul, Tokyo, London)

capabilities.returns: city{name, country}, condition, temp_c, humidity_pct, wind_kph

capabilities.description: Get multi-day weather forecast for a city
capabilities.returns: city{}, forecast[] {date, condition, temp_high_c, temp_low_c, humidity_pct, wind_kph}
